mapper.sql: id, call_id, user_id, nick_name, role, join_status, audio_enabled, video_enabled, rtc_status, join_time, leave_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into call_user( id, call_id, user_id, nick_name, role, join_status, audio_enabled, video_enabled, rtc_status, join_time, leave_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{bean.id}, #{bean.callId}, #{bean.userId}, #{bean.nickName}, #{bean.role}, #{bean.joinStatus}, #{bean.audioEnabled}, #{bean.videoEnabled}, #{bean.rtcStatus}, #{bean.joinTime}, #{bean.leaveTime}, #{bean.createTime}, #{bean.updateTime} ) on duplicate key update call_id = values(call_id), user_id = values(user_id), nick_name = values(nick_name), role = values(role), join_status = values(join_status), audio_enabled = values(audio_enabled), video_enabled = values(video_enabled), rtc_status = values(rtc_status), join_time = values(join_time), leave_time = values(leave_time), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)

insert into call_user( id, call_id, user_id, nick_name, role, join_status, audio_enabled, video_enabled, rtc_status, join_time, leave_time, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.callId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.role}, #{item.joinStatus}, #{item.audioEnabled}, #{item.videoEnabled}, #{item.rtcStatus}, #{item.joinTime}, #{item.leaveTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update call_id = values(call_id), user_id = values(user_id), nick_name = values(nick_name), role = values(role), join_status = values(join_status), audio_enabled = values(audio_enabled), video_enabled = values(video_enabled), rtc_status = values(rtc_status), join_time = values(join_time), leave_time = values(leave_time), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update call_user
call_id = #{bean.callId}, user_id = #{bean.userId}, nick_name = #{bean.nickName}, role = #{bean.role}, join_status = #{bean.joinStatus}, audio_enabled = #{bean.audioEnabled}, video_enabled = #{bean.videoEnabled}, rtc_status = #{bean.rtcStatus}, join_time = #{bean.joinTime}, leave_time = #{bean.leaveTime}, create_time = #{bean.createTime}, update_time = #{bean.updateTime},
mapper.delete: delete from call_user where call_id = #{callId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select from call_user where call_id = #{callId} and user_id = #{userId}
select from call_user where call_id = #{callId} order by role asc, id asc
